title: raw_77_nanobot_l6_handoff_v1 — hexa-bio L6 emission contract (LOCKED v1.0.0 2026-05-12)
description: N-R2 hexa-bio-side L6 single-machine-kinetics emission to the therapeutic-nanobot consumer. LOCKED 2026-05-12: verified consistent with the canon-side acceptance contract `raw_77_therapeutic_nanobot_l7_acceptance_v1` (canon@mk1:domains/life/therapeutic-nanobot/handoff/2026-05-28_hexa-nanobot-therapeutic-nanobot-boundary.json, DECLARED v1.0.0-stub; vendored ref: nanobot/spec/canon_l7_acceptance_handoff_ref.json). The L6 emitter (nanobot_actuator_v2_reference_emit.py → raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v2) produces all fields the canon side consumes_from_l6: L7_drug_load ← {work_per_cycle_kT, vertex_decorations}; L8_immune_evasion ← {pose_canonical_form}; L9_biodistribution ← {actuator_id}. emission_blocked_until_schema_lock flipped to false. The canon-side wet-lab integration + IP/contract review are DEFERRED to canon cycle 30+ (raw_91 — not a v1.x hexa-bio item; the boundary acknowledgment is the v1.x end state, and F-NB-1-c collision_overlap_ratio = 0.0 PASS).

actuator_id.description: Reference to actuator_output_v1 actuator_id (must match upstream raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v2 emission).

l6_layer.description: hexa-bio NANOBOT scope = atoms-level single-molecule architectural primitive (L0..L6).

expected_consumer_layers.description: Layers therapeutic-nanobot adds on top (clinical-application system). Schema lock pending external session.

joint_witness_path.description: Co-authored handshake JSON path per N-R2 line 37 spec.

emission_blocked_until_schema_lock.description: FALSE since 2026-05-12 (LOCKED v1.0.0): the canon-side acceptance contract raw_77_therapeutic_nanobot_l7_acceptance_v1 is DECLARED (canon@mk1; vendored ref) and the L6 emission schema is verified consistent with its consumes_from_l6 — emission unblocked. (Was true under v0.)

lock_metadata.collision_overlap_pass_gate: < 0.5 (F-NB-1-c) — PASS (L0-L6 vs L7-L9 string-disjoint by construction)
lock_metadata.wet_lab_ip_status: DEFERRED to canon cycle 30+ (canon-side; not a v1.x hexa-bio blocker)
lock_metadata.raw_91_c3: hexa-bio-side N-R2 portion CLOSED 2026-05-12: the L6 emission schema is locked v1.0.0, verified consistent with the canon-side DECLARED L7-L9 acceptance contract (vendored ref), emission unblocked.
